testimonials.title: What They Say
testimonials.t1_quote: Very satisfied with our home renovation results. The ATT team worked professionally, on time, and the results exceeded expectations. The price was also transparent with no hidden costs.
testimonials.t2_quote: My apartment's interior design turned out beautiful and functional. The process was easy, communication was smooth, and the team was very responsive to every change request.
testimonials.t3_quote: Building a home from scratch with ATT was the best decision. From design to key handover, everything went smoothly. The 3-month warranty is also very reassuring.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How long does a project take?
faq.a1: Project duration depends on scale and type of work. Small renovations usually take 2-4 weeks, total renovation 2-3 months, and new home construction 4-6 months. We provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation.
faq.q2: Is there a warranty after project completion?
faq.a2: Yes, we provide a 3-month maintenance warranty after key handover. During the warranty period, we will fix any damage caused by workmanship errors at no additional cost.
faq.a3: Payment is made in stages (terms) according to work progress. Usually divided into: Down payment (30%), 50% progress (30%), 80% progress (20%), and final payment at handover (20%). All details are outlined in the contract.
faq.q4: Can I request a custom design?
faq.a4: Absolutely! We provide custom design services according to your needs and preferences. Our architect team will help bring your vision into detailed and functional designs.
faq.a5: Currently, we serve the Greater Jakarta area (Jakarta, Bogor, Depok, Tangerang, Bekasi). For areas outside Greater Jakarta, please contact us to discuss service availability.

blog_detail.p1: Home maintenance is a long-term investment that should not be ignored. By regularly monitoring building conditions, you can avoid major damage that requires expensive repair costs. This article discusses several important aspects you need to know.
blog_detail.p2: Buildings, like vehicles, require routine maintenance to stay in optimal condition. Humidity, temperature changes, and other environmental factors can cause structural damage if not addressed promptly. Conducting inspections at least every 6 months is highly recommended.
blog_detail.h2_2: When Should You Call a Professional?
blog_detail.p3: If you find wall cracks wider than 2mm, recurring leaks, or foundation shifts, immediately contact a professional contractor. Early intervention can save up to 70% in repair costs compared to waiting for damage to escalate.

process.title: A Transparent Process
process.desc: From initial consultation to key handover, every stage is clearly communicated to you.
process.s1_desc: Needs discussion, free location survey, and initial design creation based on your vision.
process.s2_desc: Detailed design creation, working drawings, and transparent cost budget planning.
process.s3_desc: Construction execution with strict supervision and regular progress reports.
process.s4_desc: Final inspection, key handover, and the start of maintenance warranty period.
